title: ageratina tarmensis
intro: Ageratina tarmensis, also known as Hierba del León or Lion's Herb, is a flowering plant species in the mint family that is native to the Andean region of South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ageratina tarmensis include relieving pain, reducing inflammation, and supporting the immune system, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Ageratina tarmensis include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
